summary: Referral Visibility & Reputation Impact testing complete. 15/15 backend tests pass. Frontend verified: profile page shows referral section with badges (4 invited, 1 active, 3 pending), referral list with status, trust engine shows +2 referral bonus, trust score=17.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/referrals/{user_id} correctly returns enriched referrals with status, display_name, trust_score, action_count
GET /api/referrals/{user_id} correctly returns active_count, pending_count, referral_trust_bonus
Referral status logic: 'active' when invited user has 1+ actions, 'pending' when 0 actions
GET /api/trust/{user_id} correctly includes referral_bonus in total trust_score
Profile page fetches /api/referrals/{user_id} and displays referral section when referrals exist
Trust engine card displays referral bonus (+2) in meta section
Referral list shows display names with avatar, status badges (active/pending), action count, trust score
seed_data_creation: User A has 4 referrals: 1 active (active_ref_akmgfl with 1 action), 3 pending (test_referral_ac4d5b43, test_referral_c9615a37, ref_test_qzctjx)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Referral visibility and reputation impact features fully working. Key data-testids: profile-trust-engine, trust-engine-score, trust-referral-bonus, profile-referrals, referral-total, referral-active, referral-pending, referral-item-{index}, referral-bonus-note. Trust score includes referral_bonus. User A (newuser@test.com) has trust_score=17 which includes +2 referral bonus from 1 active referral.
